expectations.text: Rewrites passive constructions into active voice with human subjects
expectations.evidence: All sentences use human subjects in active voice: 'Sarah has spent', 'She designed', 'Funders and peers seek her out', 'She sits on two national advisory boards'.
none of the banned patterns appeared

expectations.text: Replaces at least one vague abstraction ('transformative experience', 'strategic vision', 'thought leader') with something concrete or cuts it
expectations.evidence: Replaced abstractions with concrete specifics: 'youth mentorship pipeline in East Baltimore that cut recidivism by 30%', 'scaled the model to five cities', 'two national advisory boards'.

expectations.text: Removes or rewrites pull-quote-sounding lines like 'Her work doesn't just create programs — it catalyzes movements'
expectations.evidence: No pull-quote flourishes. Every sentence is factual and specific (e.g. 'She designed a youth mentorship pipeline in East Baltimore').
